# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.

Prevent cross-site scripting (XSS).
# Category: xss

# app/helpers/posts_helper.rb

module PostsHelper
  # For even stricter control, define a custom sanitization method
  ALLOWED_TAGS = %w[
    p br h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6
    strong em b i u
    a img
    ul ol li
    blockquote pre code
    hr span div
    figure figcaption
    table thead tbody tr th td
  ].freeze

  ALLOWED_ATTRIBUTES = %w[
    href src alt title class width height
  ].freeze

  # Protocols allowed in href and src attributes
  ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS = %w[http https mailto].freeze

  def safe_post_content(content)
    return "" if content.blank?

    # First, sanitize with allowlisted tags and attributes
    sanitized = sanitize(content,
      tags: ALLOWED_TAGS,
      attributes: ALLOWED_ATTRIBUTES)

    # Additionally scrub dangerous URI schemes (javascript:, data:, vbscript:)
    # Rails sanitize already handles this, but we add an extra layer
    sanitized = scrub_dangerous_uris(sanitized)

    sanitized
  end

  private

  def scrub_dangerous_uris(html)
    # Parse and re-scrub links to ensure no javascript: or data: URIs sneak through
    fragment = Loofah.fragment(html)
    fragment.scrub!(ProtocolScrubber.new)
    fragment.to_s.html_safe
  end

  class ProtocolScrubber < Loofah::Scrubber
    def initialize
      @direction = :top_down
    end

    def scrub(node)
      if node.name == "a" && node["href"]
        unless safe_uri?(node["href"])
          node.remove_attribute("href")
        end
        # Force user-submitted links to open safely
        node["rel"] = "nofollow noopener noreferrer"
        node["target"] = "_blank"
      end

      if node.name == "img" && node["src"]
        unless safe_uri?(node["src"])
          node.remove
          return Loofah::Scrubber::STOP
        end
      end

      Loofah::Scrubber::CONTINUE
    end

    private

    def safe_uri?(uri)
      parsed = URI.parse(uri.to_s.strip)
      return true if parsed.relative?
      %w[http https mailto].include?(parsed.scheme&.downcase)
    rescue URI::InvalidURIError
      false
    end
  end
end
